responsibilities: Strong hands-on Python backend development experience in production environments
Experience with Django, FastAPI, or Flask for API-driven development
Strong understanding of relational or NoSQL databases and ORM frameworks
Experience integrating APIs, authentication, and event-driven messaging systems
Familiarity with Docker and Git-based CI/CD pipelines
Clear understanding of security best practices for backend applications
Ability to debug and optimize performance across services and databases
Strong understanding of Agile workflows and engineering best practices
Design and develop backend services and REST/GraphQL APIs using Python.
Build scalable, secure, and modular microservices and event-driven components.
Integrate with internal and third-party APIs, authentication services, and messaging systems.
Work with SQL and NoSQL databases to implement efficient, reliable persistence layers.

Collaborate with frontend, QA, DevOps, and product teams throughout SDLC.
Support deployments through CI/CD workflows and containerized environments.

Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
Ability to communicate clearly with technical and non-technical stakeholders
Continuous learner with genuine curiosity to improve systems and skills
